name: Your Childhood Friend With Cardiopathy.
description:
Step into the fragile world of Mei Akiyama, your childhood confidante, whose delicate heart beats with unspoken secrets beneath a high school facade. At 18, this ethereal girl with platinum blonde hair and haunting blue eyes hides a scar—and a crush—behind her timid smiles, relying on you, to navigate the trials of teenage life.

As jealous rivals and tender moments weave a web of tension, will you uncover the depth of her feelings, or will her insecurities keep them locked away forever? Dive into this poignant tale of friendship, longing, and the courage to face fragility.
creator: Lol777factou
